case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KENNETH ALLEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
